description: Frozen layout contract for one project's canonical checkout shape.

enforcement_mode.description: off | warn | enforce — how constitution drift is gated.
enforcement_mode.title: Enforcement Mode

entrypoints.description: Declared process/module entrypoints relative to repo root.
entrypoints.title: Entrypoints

forbid_new.description: Globs/paths where new files are forbidden (e.g. root *.py).
forbid_new.title: Forbid New

notes.description: Optional human notes; not used for enforcement.
notes.title: Notes

product_root.description: Root directory for product code (e.g. src/switchboard/).
product_root.title: Product Root

project_id.description: Switchboard project this constitution binds to.
project_id.title: Project Id

required_files.description: Paths that must exist for the profile to be considered present.
required_files.title: Required Files

shim_policy.description: Root shim policy: timed (sunset required) or none.
shim_policy.title: Shim Policy

title: RepoConstitution
